issue_title: DXF export fails due to missing tinycss2 Python dependency in Inkscape
issue_body_preview:
Hi, I encountered an issue when trying to convert PNG to DXF using ConvertX in Docker. The process fails due to a missing Python dependency in Inkscape. Here are the details:

### Description:

test_description_zh: 在 ConvertX 界面中上传一个 PNG 文件，选择将其转换为 DXF 格式，点击转换按钮，观察转换过程是否成功完成并能下载结果文件。
expected_result_zh: PNG 文件成功转换为 DXF 格式，转换过程无报错，用户能够正常下载转换后的 DXF 文件。
